1794240.name: SysAdmin Odyssey - Back to the office
1794240.description:
The system administrator simulator is a sandbox in which you can try on the role of a system administrator in offices of different types and sizes and even remotely!
Every new game day you will face different tasks and problems in the office where you work. Scared users will come running to you and tell you that their keyboard is not working and the printer has stopped printing. Will you be able to solve all the problems effectively, or will you accumulate a lot of debts on tasks and violate the SLA? Or maybe you will be able to teach users how to solve their own minor problems, while you drink coffee at home? It all depends on you!


In this game you are waiting for:
- Simulation of computer networks and devices.
- Dynamic system of events and various breakdowns.
- Variability and the ability to influence the gameplay with your own decisions.
- Generating user problems from a variety of different options that you need to diagnose and solve.
- Setting up network equipment.
- Troubleshooting computer networks and systems.
- Time management.
1794240.supported_languages: 英语, 俄语, 法语, 波兰语, 乌克兰语, 瑞典语, 德语, 意大利语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 保加利亚语, 丹麦语, 简体中文, 韩语, 挪威语, 泰语, 土耳其语, 捷克语, 日语, 白俄罗斯语, 拉脱维亚语, 斯洛伐克语, 印地语, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙
